# Emulator adapter fixtures

Future scanner tests place versioned emulator-capability records and example
commands here. Fixtures must cover:

- native executable and Flatpak launch forms;
- RetroArch core identification;
- playlist support without initial-disc selection;
- zero-based and one-based initial-disc flags;
- direct-disc to canonical-playlist migration;
- preservation of existing user-authored playlists;
- rollback to original Steam shortcut targets.
